---
title: "correction"
author: "AndreyPovaliy"
date: "2025-09-05"
output: word_document
# bibliography: references.bib
# csl: gost-r-7-0-5-2008.csl
# csl: gost-r-7-0-5-2008-numeric-alphabetical.csl
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
source("/Users/andreypovaliy/Documents/Science/ABUS_US_diagnostics/XLXS_ver1/00_preprocessing_data/05_real_script.R")
```

# Коррекции

| Категория BIRADS |Процентная доля|95% ДИ |Процентная доля|95% ДИ | 
|------|------|------|------|------|
|Группы|Группа X|------|Группа Y|------| 
|Birads 1|20.58% (149/724)|[0.18;0.24]|21.133% (153/724)|[0.18;0.24]| 
|Birads 2|56.492% (409/724)|[0.53;0.6]|58.702% (425/724)|[0.55;0.62]| 
|Birads 3|17.127% (124/724)|[0.14;0.2]|15.193% (110/724)|[0.13;0.18]| 
|Birads 4b|1.657% (12/724)|[0.01;0.03]|0.829% (6/724)|[0;0.02]| 
|Birads 4а|3.315% (24/724)|[0.02;0.05]|1.657% (12/724)|[0.01;0.03]| 
|Birads 5|0.829% (6/724)|[0;0.02]|2.486% (18/724)|[0.02;0.04]|
